summary: Iteration 22: BIQC Intelligence Pipeline Stability - All 18 tests PASSED. Verified 3-stage pipeline code fixes: (1) emission_layer.run_emission() now called in cold-read, (2) status filter removed from _get_account_tokens(), (3) watchtower_engine.run_analysis() now called. Test user has no workspace initialized, so full E2E pipeline execution could not be verified, but all code fixes are confirmed.

minor.issue: Returns 400 'Workspace not initialized' for test user andre@thestrategysquad.com.au - user has no workspace/account configured

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: merge_emission_layer.py _get_account_tokens() at line 585-587 has NO .eq('status', 'active') filter - FIX CONFIRMED
VERIFIED: server.py cold-read endpoint calls emission_layer.run_emission(user_id, account_id) at line 9582 - FIX CONFIRMED
VERIFIED: server.py cold-read endpoint calls engine.run_analysis(user_id) at line 9595 - FIX CONFIRMED
VERIFIED: Pipeline order is STAGE 1 emission (line 9578) → STAGE 2 watchtower (line 9590) → STAGE 3 cold-read (line 9600)
VERIFIED: /api/intelligence/data-readiness returns integrations with observation_events counts
VERIFIED: All authenticated endpoints return 401 for unauthenticated requests
NOTE: Test user andre@thestrategysquad.com.au has workspace_id=null, integrations.count=0 - no workspace initialized
NOTE: Cold-read returns 400 'Workspace not initialized' which is correct behavior for user without workspace
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 22 verified all 3-stage intelligence pipeline code fixes. Key verifications: (1) emission_layer.run_emission() is now called in cold-read endpoint at line 9582, (2) _get_account_tokens() in merge_emission_layer.py no longer has .eq('status', 'active') filter, (3) watchtower_engine.run_analysis() is now called at line 9595. The test user andre@thestrategysquad.com.au does NOT have a workspace initialized (workspace_id=null, integrations.count=0), so the cold-read endpoint correctly returns 400 'Workspace not initialized'. To fully E2E test the pipeline with actual integration data, a user with workspace AND integrations (HubSpot, Xero, Outlook) is required.
